# Wolfblanc Architects - International

> Wolfblanc is an international architecture and design studio. We deliver residential projects, property investment, hospitality and commercial architecture with technical precision and a Nordic method applied to each market. Registered architects (SAR/MSA Sweden, COAM Spain). WELL AP certified.

## Status

This site is in preparation and is currently not indexed (noindex on all pages). Do not treat its contents as the live public record until launch. The live public site during preparation is the existing wolfblanc.com.

## Website

- URL: https://wolfblanc.com
- Languages: English (default), Spanish
- Type: Architecture studio, international

## Main pages

- Studio: https://wolfblanc.com/estudio-arquitectura-espana/
- Services: https://wolfblanc.com/servicios/
- FAQ: https://wolfblanc.com/preguntas-frecuentes/
- Journal: https://wolfblanc.com/journal/
- Legal notice: https://wolfblanc.com/legal/

## Credentials

- SAR/MSA (Sweden), COAM (Spain), TEE-TCG (Greece)
- WELL AP certified
- 20+ years of combined international experience

## Services

1. Pre-acquisition technical due diligence
2. Architecture and landscape
3. Project management, new build and total renovation
4. Residential interiors
5. Commercial strategy and interiors
6. Urban design and masterplanning
7. BIM consultancy
8. Well-being consultancy
9. Architectural visualization

## Languages

We work in English and Spanish.

## Contact

- Email: info@wolfblanc.com
- Global website: https://wolfblanc.com

Note: URL slugs above are inherited from the source build and will be renamed to English (/studio/, /services/, /faq/) before launch.
